refined_caption: A rodent is visible in the hospital room, with a person in the background. The rodent appears to be roaming freely in the room.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat in my hospital room while I was visiting a patient. The rodent was running around the room, and it was very disturbing. I'm concerned about the cleanliness and safety of the hospital.
voice_text: There's a rat in the hospital room, it's just running around with people in there. This is really disgusting and something needs to be done about it.
